latest.title: Brookfield Wealth Solutions Announces Shareholder Approval of Transaction to Simplify Corporate Structure and Results o...
latest.summary: Brookfield Wealth Solutions shareholders approved a corporate restructuring transaction that will result in the company being delisted and Brookfield Corporation becoming the new parent entity listed on TSX and NYSE under symbol 'BN'. The transaction is expected to close by year-end pending regulatory approvals. All n.
